top3.sql:
SELECT 
    i_category AS item_department,
    s_store_name AS store_name,
    SUM(ss_ext_sales_price) AS total_sales
FROM store_sales
JOIN item ON ss_item_sk = i_item_sk
JOIN store ON ss_store_sk = s_store_sk
JOIN date_dim ON ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
WHERE d_quarter_name = '2001Q1'
GROUP BY i_category, s_store_name
ORDER BY item_department, store_name
LIMIT 100

SELECT 
    i_item_desc,
    s_store_name,
    SUM(ss_ext_sales_price) AS total_sales
FROM 
    store_sales
    JOIN store ON store_sales.ss_store_sk = store.s_store_sk
    JOIN item ON store_sales.ss_item_sk = item.i_item_sk
    JOIN date_dim ON store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
WHERE 
    date_dim.d_quarter_seq = (SELECT d_quarter_seq FROM date_dim WHERE d_year = 2001 AND d_moy = 1 LIMIT 1)
GROUP BY 
    i_item_desc,
    s_store_name
ORDER BY 
    total_sales DESC
LIMIT 100;

SELECT 
    i.i_item_desc,
    s.s_store_name,
    SUM(ss.ss_ext_sales_price) AS total_sales
FROM 
    store_sales ss
    JOIN store s ON ss.ss_store_sk = s.s_store_sk
    JOIN item i ON ss.ss_item_sk = i.i_item_sk
    JOIN date_dim d ON ss.ss_sold_date_sk = d.d_date_sk
WHERE 
    d.d_year = 2001 
    AND d.d_moy = 1
GROUP BY 
    i.i_item_desc,
    s.s_store_name
ORDER BY 
    total_sales DESC
LIMIT 100;

final.sql:
SELECT 
    i_category AS item_department,
    s_store_name AS store_name,
    SUM(ss_ext_sales_price) AS total_sales
FROM store_sales
JOIN item ON ss_item_sk = i_item_sk
JOIN store ON ss_store_sk = s_store_sk
JOIN date_dim ON ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
WHERE d_quarter_name = '2001Q1'
GROUP BY i_category, s_store_name
ORDER BY item_department, store_name
LIMIT 100
